lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Iestin. So they made you the new Lord Iorwerth?

lines.speaker: Lord Iestin Iorwerth
lines.text: Indeed. Apart from Morvran, I am the closest living relative of the previous Lord Iorwerth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did Morvran not want the role?

lines.speaker: Lord Iestin Iorwerth
lines.text: No. That's probably for the best though. Morvran was very close to my predecessor. It would have made many uncomfortable if he had taken on the role.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How have things been since the city was reformed?

lines.speaker: Lord Iestin Iorwerth
lines.text: The others still hold a lot of mistrust for our clan. It will take a long time for those rifts to be repaired. We are on the right path though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good to hear. All the best.
